---

**To:** mary.lee@work.mosi.inc  
**Subject:** BUG Fix Complete & New Project Discussion

Hi Mary,

I wanted to let you know that the serious BUG you discovered last night has been **fixed**.

Could you let me know when you'd be available to discuss plans for the new project? I'm flexible and can work around your schedule.

Best regards
